children.heading: State contact persons
children.label: a State contact persons
children.text: Each State shall designate an individual to serve as a State contact person for the purpose of receiving and disseminating information and communications received from the Council, including the bimonthly bulletin described in section 11313(a)(7) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: State interagency councils and lead agencies
children.label: b State interagency councils and lead agencies
children.text: Each State is encouraged to establish a State interagency council on the homeless or designate a lead agency for the State for the purpose of assuming primary responsibility for coordinating and interacting with the Council and State and local agencies as necessary.
